LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.promptFieldInstructio: Beliefs I held at the time. Let them color my reaction and word choice; do not invent doctrine beyond them or claim they caused what happened.
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.interpretationFactFor: Within {0}, the view most relevant to this event was {1}: {2}
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.interpretationFactWit: Within {0}, the view most relevant to this event was {1}.
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.certaintyBands.0.phra: Write with firm conviction, staying inside the supplied facts.
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.certaintyBands.1.phra: Write with quiet assurance; do not escalate into zeal or extremism.
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.certaintyBands.2.phra: Let unease and small reservations show; the belief itself still holds.
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.certaintyBands.3.phra: Show an active struggle between doctrine and lived experience.
LanguageData.Diary_BeliefPolicy.certaintyBands.4.phra: Voice open questioning and uncertainty; do not force grief or a conversion.
